Marwaris, the people of Cutch, Surat,. and Madra, the Paflcalas,
the Kekayas, the Kulatakas (people of Kulu valley ?), the canni-

ings for seven months.
[Fourteen geographical units are mentioned here according
to the ancient geographical subdivision of the country.
The metre of this verse is
fffsrhra sftercfw: n^u
If the Moon's disc is cut by the conjunction of Jupiter, the
people of Gandhara, Sauvlraka, Sindhu and Kira, and all kinds
of corn, mountains, kings of the Dravi^a country and Brahmins
will be troubled for ten months.
[Some more regions are mentioned here. It is to be remember-
ed that Jupiter presides over the Brahmin community. The metre
is l]
If Mars should obstruct the Moon's orb, it would cause
troubles for six months to kings who have mobilized their army
for war along with their vehicles (such as chariots, elephants and
horses), the Traigartas (people and kings of the Trigarta region),
